- [ ] US1 — Build hybrid query retrieval: combine graph traversal with local text relevance for `graph query`.
- [ ] US2 — Project compact task context: shape ranked retrieval output into a token-budgeted context envelope.
- [ ] US3 — Explain retrieval results and provenance: justify retrieval decisions with provenance and ranking details.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH1-cognitive-graph-engine-mvp/epics/E3-hybrid-retrieval-context/stories/`
